tldr: This paper introduces HE-VPR, a height-estimation-enabled visual place recognition framework for aerial images that leverages height information to improve recall and reduce memory usage by decoupling this from place recognition. The approach uses a frozen DINOv2 backbone with lightweight adapter branches for height estimation and VPR, along with a center-weighted masking strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为HE-VPR的视觉地点识别框架，该框架通过结合高度估计功能，在空中图像中实现了更高的识别精度和更低的内存占用。该方法将高度推断与地点识别分离，使用冻结的DINOv2骨干网络及轻量级适配器分支进行高度估计和VPR，并采用中心加权遮罩策略。
summary_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为HE-VPR的视觉定位识别（VPR）框架，该框架整合了高度估计。我们的系统将高度推断与定位识别解耦，使得两个模块能够共享一个冻结的DINOv2骨干网络。两个轻量级的旁路适配器分支被集成到我们的系统中。第一个通过从紧凑的高度数据库检索来估计查询图像的高度分区，第二个在相应的高度特定子数据库中执行VPR。这种适配设计降低了训练成本，并显著减小了数据库的搜索空间。我们还采用了一种中心加权掩码策略，以进一步增强对尺度差异的鲁棒性。在两个我们自行收集的具有挑战性的多高度数据集上的实验表明，HE-VPR相比于最先进的基于ViT的基线模型，实现了高达6.1%的Recall@1提升，且内存占用降低了高达90%。这些结果表明，HE-VPR为高度感知的空中VPR提供了一种可扩展且高效的解决方案，使其能够在GNSS拒止环境中进行实际部署。本工作的所有代码和数据集已在https://github.com/hmf21/HE-VPR上发布。

title: Passive Phase-Oriented Impedance Shaping for Rapid Acceleration in Soft Robotic Swimmers
summary: Rapid acceleration and burst maneuvers in underwater robots depend less on maintaining precise resonance and more on force--velocity phase alignment during thrust generation. In this work, we investigate constrained-layer damping (CLD) as a passive mechanism for frequency-selective impedance shaping in soft robotic swimmers. Unlike conventional stiffness-tuning approaches, CLD selectively amplifies the dissipative component of bending impedance while preserving storage stiffness, passively shifting the impedance composition toward dissipative dominance as actuation frequency increases. We characterize this behavior through dry impedance measurements, demonstrate that CLD enhances thrust and alters force--motion phase relationships across Strouhal numbers in constrained propulsion tests, and validate that passive impedance shaping yields a nearly five-fold increase in peak acceleration and a three-fold increase in terminal velocity in unconstrained swimming trials. These results establish phase-oriented passive impedance modulation as a simple, control-free pathway for improving transient propulsion in soft robotic systems.
tldr: The paper presents a passive damping mechanism for soft robotic swimmers that improves acceleration and velocity by shaping impedance to enhance force-velocity phase alignment during thrust generation, achieving significant performance gains in unconstrained swimming.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于软体机器人游泳器的被动阻尼机制，通过调节阻抗来增强推力产生过程中的力-速度相位对齐，从而提高加速度和速度，在无约束游泳中实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 水下机器人的快速加速和突发机动更多地依赖于推力生成过程中力-速度相位对齐，而非维持精确的共振。在本研究中，我们探讨了约束层阻尼（CLD）作为一种被动机制，用于软体机器人游泳器中的频率选择性阻抗塑造。与传统的刚度调节方法不同，CLD选择性地放大弯曲阻抗的耗散分量，同时保持存储刚度，从而在驱动频率增加时被动地将阻抗组成向耗散主导转变。我们通过干态阻抗测量来表征这种行为，证明了CLD在约束推进测试中增强了推力并改变了跨斯特劳哈尔数的力-运动相位关系，并验证了被动阻抗塑造在非约束游泳试验中产生了近五倍的峰值加速度和三倍的终端速度提升。这些结果确立了面向相位的被动阻抗调制作为一种简单、无需控制的途径，用于改善软体机器人系统的瞬态推进。

title: Radar-based Pose Optimization for HD Map Generation from Noisy Multi-Drive Vehicle Fleet Data
summary: High-definition (HD) maps are important for autonomous driving, but their manual generation and maintenance is very expensive. This motivates the usage of an automated map generation pipeline. Fleet vehicles provide sufficient sensors for map generation, but their measurements are less precise, introducing noise into the mapping pipeline. This work focuses on mitigating the localization noise component through aligning radar measurements in terms of raw radar point clouds of vehicle poses of different drives and performing pose graph optimization to produce a globally optimized solution between all drives present in the dataset. Improved poses are first used to generate a global radar occupancy map, aimed to facilitate precise on-vehicle localization. Through qualitative analysis we show contrast-rich feature clarity, focusing on omnipresent guardrail posts as the main feature type observable in the map. Second, the improved poses can be used as a basis for an existing lane boundary map generation pipeline, majorly improving map output compared to its original pure line detection based optimization approach.
tldr: This paper presents a radar-based approach to improve HD map generation from noisy multi-drive vehicle data by optimizing vehicle poses using radar point cloud alignment and pose graph optimization, thus enhancing map quality for autonomous driving.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于雷达的方法，通过使用雷达点云对齐和姿态图优化来优化车辆姿态，从而改进从嘈杂的多驱动车辆数据中生成的高精度地图，进而提升自动驾驶的地图质量。
summary_zh: 高清 (HD) 地图对于自动驾驶至关重要，但其手动生成和维护成本非常高昂。这促进了自动化地图生成流程的使用。车队车辆为地图生成提供了足够的传感器，但其测量精度较低，从而将噪声引入到地图构建流程中。本工作重点在于通过对齐不同行驶车辆姿态的原始雷达点云中的雷达测量值，并执行姿态图优化，从而缓解定位噪声分量，以产生数据集中所有行驶车辆之间的全局优化解。首先，改进后的姿态被用于生成全局雷达占据栅格地图，旨在促进精确的车载定位。通过定性分析，我们展示了具有对比度丰富的特征清晰度，重点关注普遍存在的护栏柱，作为地图中可观察的主要特征类型。其次，改进后的姿态可以作为现有车道线边界地图生成流程的基础，与原始的纯粹基于线检测的优化方法相比，显著改善了地图输出。

title: Impact of Localization Errors on Label Quality for Online HD Map Construction
summary: High-definition (HD) maps are crucial for autonomous vehicles, but their creation and maintenance is very costly. This motivates the idea of online HD map construction. To provide a continuous large-scale stream of training data, existing HD maps can be used as labels for onboard sensor data from consumer vehicle fleets. However, compared to current, well curated HD map perception datasets, this fleet data suffers from localization errors, resulting in distorted map labels. We introduce three kinds of localization errors, Ramp, Gaussian, and Perlin noise, to examine their influence on generated map labels. We train a variant of MapTRv2, a state-of-the-art online HD map construction model, on the Argoverse 2 dataset with various levels of localization errors and assess the degradation of model performance. Since localization errors affect distant labels more severely, but are also less significant to driving performance, we introduce a distance-based map construction metric. Our experiments reveal that localization noise affects the model performance significantly. We demonstrate that errors in heading angle exert a more substantial influence than position errors, as angle errors result in a greater distortion of labels as distance to the vehicle increases. Furthermore, we can demonstrate that the model benefits from non-distorted ground truth (GT) data and that the performance decreases more than linearly with the increase in noisy data. Our study additionally provides a qualitative evaluation of the extent to which localization errors influence the construction of HD maps.
tldr: The paper investigates the impact of localization errors on the quality of labels used for online HD map construction, showing that angle errors are more detrimental than position errors and performance degrades non-linearly with increasing noise.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了定位误差对在线高清地图构建中标签质量的影响，表明角度误差比位置误差更有害，并且性能随噪声增加呈非线性下降。
summary_zh: 高清地图对于自动驾驶车辆至关重要，但其创建和维护成本非常高昂。 这激发了在线高清地图构建的想法。 为了提供连续的大规模训练数据流，现有的高清地图可以作为车载传感器数据的标签，这些数据来自消费级车辆车队。 然而，与当前精心策划的高清地图感知数据集相比，这种车队数据会受到定位误差的影响，导致地图标签失真。 我们引入了三种定位误差，即斜坡、高斯和 Perlin 噪声，以检验它们对生成的地图标签的影响。 我们在包含不同程度定位误差的 Argoverse 2 数据集上训练了 MapTRv2 的一个变体，MapTRv2 是一种最先进的在线高清地图构建模型，并评估了模型性能的下降情况。 由于定位误差对远处标签的影响更为严重，但对驾驶性能的影响较小，因此我们引入了一种基于距离的地图构建指标。 我们的实验表明，定位噪声对模型性能有显著影响。 我们证明，航向角的误差比位置误差的影响更大，因为角度误差会导致标签的失真程度随着与车辆距离的增加而增大。 此外，我们可以证明该模型受益于未失真的真值 (GT) 数据，并且性能的下降速度比噪声数据增加的速度更快（非线性关系）。 我们的研究还对定位误差在多大程度上影响高清地图的构建进行了定性评估。

title: The Empty Quadrant: AI Teammates for Embodied Field Learning
summary: For four decades, AIED research has rested on what we term the Sedentary Assumption: the unexamined design commitment to a stationary learner seated before a screen. Mobile learning and museum guides have moved learners into physical space, and context-aware systems have delivered location-triggered content -- yet these efforts predominantly cast AI in the role of information-de-livery tool rather than epistemic partner. We map this gap through a 2 x 2 matrix (AI Role x Learning Environment) and identify an undertheorized intersection: the configuration in which AI serves as an epistemic teammate during unstruc-tured, place-bound field inquiry and learning is assessed through trajectory rather than product. To fill it, we propose Field Atlas, a framework grounded in embod-ied, embedded, enactive, and extended (4E) cognition, active inference, and dual coding theory that shifts AIED's guiding metaphor from instruction to sensemak-ing. The architecture pairs volitional photography with immediate voice reflec-tion, constrains AI to Socratic provocation rather than answer delivery, and ap-plies Epistemic Trajectory Modeling (ETM) to represent field learning as a con-tinuous trajectory through conjoined physical-epistemic space. We demonstrate the framework through a museum scenario and argue that the resulting trajecto-ries -- bound to a specific body, place, and time -- constitute process-based evi-dence structurally resistant to AI fabrication, offering a new assessment paradigm and reorienting AIED toward embodied, dialogic human-AI sensemaking in the wild.
tldr: The paper introduces Field Atlas, a novel AIED framework for embodied field learning, focusing on AI as an epistemic teammate rather than a simple information provider and utilizing trajectory-based assessment rather than product-based, addressing a gap in current AIED research.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Field Atlas的新型具身场所学习的AIED框架，重点关注AI作为认知队友而非简单的信息提供者，并利用基于轨迹的评估而非基于产品的评估，从而解决了当前AIED研究中的差距。
summary_zh: 四十年来，AIED研究一直基于我们称之为“静坐假设”的前提：未经过审视的设计理念，即学习者静坐在屏幕前。移动学习和博物馆导览已将学习者转移到物理空间中，情境感知系统也提供了位置触发的内容——然而，这些努力主要将AI视为信息传递工具，而非认知伙伴。我们通过一个2x2矩阵（AI角色 x 学习环境）来描绘这一差距，并识别出一个理论不足的交叉点：AI在非结构化的、基于场所的实地探究中充当认知队友，并且学习成果是通过轨迹而非产品来评估。为了弥补这一不足，我们提出了“田野图谱”(Field Atlas)框架，该框架基于具身、嵌入、行动和扩展（4E）认知、主动推断和双重编码理论，将AIED的指导隐喻从教学转向意义建构。该架构将自主摄影与即时语音反思配对，将AI限制于苏格拉底式的启发，而非答案传递，并应用认知轨迹建模(ETM)将实地学习表示为在物理-认知空间中的连续轨迹。我们通过一个博物馆场景来演示该框架，并论证由此产生的轨迹——与特定的身体、地点和时间相关联——构成了基于过程的证据，在结构上能够抵御AI伪造，从而提供了一种新的评估范式并将AIED重新定向到野外环境中具身、对话式的人机协同意义建构。

title: Cross-Modal Mapping and Dual-Branch Reconstruction for 2D-3D Multimodal Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Multimodal industrial anomaly detection benefits from integrating RGB appearance with 3D surface geometry, yet existing \emph{unsupervised} approaches commonly rely on memory banks, teacher-student architectures, or fragile fusion schemes, limiting robustness under noisy depth, weak texture, or missing modalities. This paper introduces \textbf{CMDR-IAD}, a lightweight and modality-flexible unsupervised framework for reliable anomaly detection in 2D+3D multimodal as well as single-modality (2D-only or 3D-only) settings. \textbf{CMDR-IAD} combines bidirectional 2D$\leftrightarrow$3D cross-modal mapping to model appearance-geometry consistency with dual-branch reconstruction that independently captures normal texture and geometric structure. A two-part fusion strategy integrates these cues: a reliability-gated mapping anomaly highlights spatially consistent texture-geometry discrepancies, while a confidence-weighted reconstruction anomaly adaptively balances appearance and geometric deviations, yielding stable and precise anomaly localization even in depth-sparse or low-texture regions. On the MVTec 3D-AD benchmark, CMDR-IAD achieves state-of-the-art performance while operating without memory banks, reaching 97.3\% image-level AUROC (I-AUROC), 99.6\% pixel-level AUROC (P-AUROC), and 97.6\% AUPRO. On a real-world polyurethane cutting dataset, the 3D-only variant attains 92.6\% I-AUROC and 92.5\% P-AUROC, demonstrating strong effectiveness under practical industrial conditions. These results highlight the framework's robustness, modality flexibility, and the effectiveness of the proposed fusion strategies for industrial visual inspection. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ECGAI-Research/CMDR-IAD/
tldr: The paper introduces CMDR-IAD, a lightweight unsupervised framework for 2D+3D industrial anomaly detection, achieving state-of-the-art performance by combining cross-modal mapping and dual-branch reconstruction with robust fusion strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CMDR-IAD，一个轻量级的无监督框架，用于2D+3D工业异常检测。它通过结合跨模态映射和双分支重建以及鲁棒的融合策略，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 多模态工业异常检测受益于RGB外观和3D表面几何信息的融合，然而，现有的\emph{无监督}方法通常依赖于记忆库、师生架构或脆弱的融合方案，限制了其在嘈杂深度、弱纹理或模态缺失下的鲁棒性。本文提出\textbf{CMDR-IAD}，一个轻量级且模态灵活的无监督框架，用于在2D+3D多模态以及单模态（仅2D或仅3D）设置下进行可靠的异常检测。\textbf{CMDR-IAD}结合了双向2D$\leftrightarrow$3D跨模态映射来建模外观-几何一致性，以及独立捕获正常纹理和几何结构的双分支重建。一个两部分的融合策略集成了这些线索：一个可靠性门控的映射异常突出显示了空间一致的纹理-几何差异，而一个置信度加权的重建异常自适应地平衡了外观和几何偏差，即使在深度稀疏或低纹理区域也能产生稳定而精确的异常定位。在MVTec 3D-AD基准测试上，CMDR-IAD在不使用记忆库的情况下实现了最先进的性能，图像级AUROC（I-AUROC）达到97.3%，像素级AUROC（P-AUROC）达到99.6%，AUPRO达到97.6%。在一个真实的聚氨酯切割数据集上，仅3D变体达到了92.6%的I-AUROC和92.5%的P-AUROC，证明了其在实际工业条件下的强大有效性。这些结果突显了该框架的鲁棒性、模态灵活性以及所提出的融合策略在工业视觉检测中的有效性。我们的源代码可在https://github.com/ECGAI-Research/CMDR-IAD/ 获得。

title: Selecting Offline Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Stochastic Network Control
summary: Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) is a promising approach for next-generation wireless networks, where online exploration is unsafe and large amounts of operational data can be reused across the model lifecycle. However, the behavior of offline RL algorithms under genuinely stochastic dynamics -- inherent to wireless systems due to fading, noise, and traffic mobility -- remains insufficiently understood. We address this gap by evaluating Bellman-based (Conservative Q-Learning), sequence-based (Decision Transformers), and hybrid (Critic-Guided Decision Transformers) offline RL methods in an open-access stochastic telecom environment (mobile-env). Our results show that Conservative Q-Learning consistently produces more robust policies across different sources of stochasticity, making it a reliable default choice in lifecycle-driven AI management frameworks. Sequence-based methods remain competitive and can outperform Bellman-based approaches when sufficient high-return trajectories are available. These findings provide practical guidance for offline RL algorithm selection in AI-driven network control pipelines, such as O-RAN and future 6G functions, where robustness and data availability are key operational constraints.
tldr: This paper evaluates different offline RL algorithms for stochastic network control, finding Conservative Q-Learning to be the most robust. The research provides guidance for selecting offline RL algorithms in network control applications.
tldr_zh: 本文评估了不同的离线强化学习算法在随机网络控制中的表现，发现保守Q学习是最稳健的。该研究为在网络控制应用中选择离线强化学习算法提供了指导。
summary_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）是下一代无线网络的一种很有前景的方法，在这些网络中，在线探索是不安全的，并且大量的运营数据可以在模型生命周期中重复使用。然而，离线强化学习算法在真实随机动态下的行为——由于衰落、噪声和流量移动性而固有的无线系统特性——仍未得到充分理解。我们通过在一个开放存取的随机电信环境（mobile-env）中评估基于贝尔曼的（保守Q学习）、基于序列的（决策转换器）和混合的（评论家引导的决策转换器）离线RL方法来弥合这一差距。我们的结果表明，保守Q学习在不同的随机性来源下始终产生更稳健的策略，使其成为生命周期驱动的AI管理框架中一个可靠的默认选择。基于序列的方法仍然具有竞争力，并且在有足够的高回报轨迹可用时，可以优于基于贝尔曼的方法。这些发现为AI驱动的网络控制管道（例如O-RAN和未来的6G功能）中的离线RL算法选择提供了实践指导，在这些管道中，稳健性和数据可用性是关键的运营约束。

title: The Controllability Trap: A Governance Framework for Military AI Agents
summary: Agentic AI systems - capable of goal interpretation, world modeling, planning, tool use, long-horizon operation, and autonomous coordination - introduce distinct control failures not addressed by existing safety frameworks. We identify six agentic governance failures tied to these capabilities and show how they erode meaningful human control in military settings. We propose the Agentic Military AI Governance Framework (AMAGF), a measurable architecture structured around three pillars: Preventive Governance (reducing failure likelihood), Detective Governance (real-time detection of control degradation), and Corrective Governance (restoring or safely degrading operations). Its core mechanism, the Control Quality Score (CQS), is a composite real-time metric quantifying human control and enabling graduated responses as control weakens. For each failure type, we define concrete mechanisms, assign responsibilities across five institutional actors, and formalize evaluation metrics. A worked operational scenario illustrates implementation, and we situate the framework within established agent safety literature. We argue that governance must move from a binary conception of control to a continuous model in which control quality is actively measured and managed throughout the operational lifecycle.
tldr: This paper introduces a governance framework (AMAGF) for military AI agents, addressing control failures in agentic AI systems by measuring and managing control quality throughout the operational lifecycle.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个针对军用人工智能主体的治理框架（AMAGF），通过在整个运营生命周期中测量和管理控制质量，解决了主体人工智能系统中存在的控制失败问题。
summary_zh: 代理式人工智能系统——具备目标解释、世界建模、规划、工具使用、长周期运行和自主协调能力——引入了现有的安全框架未解决的独特控制失效。我们识别出与这些能力相关的六种代理治理失效，并展示了它们如何侵蚀在军事环境中具有意义的人类控制。我们提出了代理式军事人工智能治理框架（AMAGF），这是一个围绕三大支柱构建的可测量架构：预防性治理（降低失效可能性）、侦测性治理（实时检测控制降级）和修正性治理（恢复或安全降级操作）。其核心机制是控制质量评分（CQS），一种量化人类控制的综合实时指标，能够在控制减弱时实现分级响应。对于每种失效类型，我们定义了具体的机制，在五个机构参与者之间分配职责，并形式化了评估指标。一个经过验证的作战场景说明了实施过程，我们将该框架置于已有的代理安全文献之中。我们认为，治理必须从控制的二元概念转变为一个连续模型，在该模型中，在整个运营生命周期中积极地衡量和管理控制质量。

title: SynthCharge: An Electric Vehicle Routing Instance Generator with Feasibility Screening to Enable Learning-Based Optimization and Benchmarking
summary: The electric vehicle routing problem with time windows (EVRPTW) extends the classical VRPTW by introducing battery capacity constraints and charging station decisions. Existing benchmark datasets are often static and lack verifiable feasibility, which restricts reproducible evaluation of learning-based routing models. We introduce SynthCharge, a parametric generator that produces diverse, feasibility-screened EVRPTW instances across varying spatiotemporal configurations and scalable customer counts. While SynthCharge can currently generate large-scale instances of up to 500 customers, we focus our experiments on sizes ranging from 5 to 100 customers. Unlike static benchmark suites, SynthCharge integrates instance geometry with adaptive energy capacity scaling and range-aware charging station placement. To guarantee structural validity, the generator systematically filters out unsolvable instances through a fast feasibility screening process. Ultimately, SynthCharge provides the dynamic benchmarking infrastructure needed to systematically evaluate the robustness of emerging neural routing and data-driven approaches.
tldr: The paper introduces SynthCharge, a parametric generator for Electric Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows (EVRPTW) instances, featuring feasibility screening for reliable benchmarking of learning-based routing models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为SynthCharge的参数化生成器，用于生成具有时间窗的电动汽车路径问题（EVRPTW）实例，其特点是具有可行性筛选，用于可靠地基准测试基于学习的路径模型。
summary_zh: 具有时间窗的电动车辆路径问题(EVRPTW)通过引入电池容量约束和充电站决策，扩展了经典的VRPTW。现有的基准数据集通常是静态的，并且缺乏可验证的可行性，这限制了基于学习的路径模型的再现性评估。我们引入了SynthCharge，一个参数化的生成器，用于生成具有多样性、经过可行性筛选的EVRPTW实例，覆盖不同的时空配置和可扩展的客户数量。虽然SynthCharge目前可以生成高达500个客户的大规模实例，但我们将实验重点放在5到100个客户的规模上。与静态基准套件不同，SynthCharge将实例几何形状与自适应能量容量缩放和范围感知的充电站放置相结合。为了保证结构有效性，该生成器通过快速可行性筛选过程系统地过滤掉无法解决的实例。最终，SynthCharge提供了动态基准测试基础设施，用于系统地评估新兴神经路径和数据驱动方法的鲁棒性。

title: Gaussian Wardrobe: Compositional 3D Gaussian Avatars for Free-Form Virtual Try-On
summary: We introduce Gaussian Wardrobe, a novel framework to digitalize compositional 3D neural avatars from multi-view videos. Existing methods for 3D neural avatars typically treat the human body and clothing as an inseparable entity. However, this paradigm fails to capture the dynamics of complex free-form garments and limits the reuse of clothing across different individuals. To overcome these problems, we develop a novel, compositional 3D Gaussian representation to build avatars from multiple layers of free-form garments. The core of our method is decomposing neural avatars into bodies and layers of shape-agnostic neural garments. To achieve this, our framework learns to disentangle each garment layer from multi-view videos and canonicalizes it into a shape-independent space. In experiments, our method models photorealistic avatars with high-fidelity dynamics, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on novel pose synthesis benchmarks. In addition, we demonstrate that the learned compositional garments contribute to a versatile digital wardrobe, enabling a practical virtual try-on application where clothing can be freely transferred to new subjects. Project page: https://ait.ethz.ch/gaussianwardrobe
tldr: The paper introduces Gaussian Wardrobe, a novel framework using compositional 3D Gaussian representations to create digital avatars with layered, shape-agnostic clothing, enabling free-form virtual try-on.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 Gaussian Wardrobe 的新框架，它使用可组合的 3D 高斯表示来创建具有分层、与形状无关的服装的数字头像，从而实现自由形式的虚拟试穿。
summary_zh: 我们提出了高斯衣橱，一种新颖的框架，用于从多视角视频中数字化组合式3D神经化身。现有的3D神经化身方法通常将人体和服装视为一个不可分割的整体。然而，这种范式无法捕捉复杂自由形态服装的动态，并限制了服装在不同个体之间的重复使用。为了克服这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的、组合式的3D高斯表示，从多层自由形态服装构建化身。我们方法的核心是将神经化身分解为身体和形态无关的神经服装层。为了实现这一点，我们的框架学习从多视角视频中解耦每一服装层，并将其规范化到与形状无关的空间中。在实验中，我们的方法对具有高保真动态的逼真化身进行建模，在新姿态合成基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们证明了学习到的组合式服装有助于构建一个多功能的数字衣橱，从而实现了一个实用的虚拟试穿应用，其中服装可以自由地转移到新的对象身上。项目主页：https://ait.ethz.ch/gaussianwardrobe

title: A Baseline Study and Benchmark for Few-Shot Open-Set Action Recognition with Feature Residual Discrimination
summary: Few-Shot Action Recognition (FS-AR) has shown promising results but is often limited by a closed-set assumption that fails in real-world open-set scenarios. While Few-Shot Open-Set (FSOS) recognition is well-established for images, its extension to spatio-temporal video data remains underexplored. To address this, we propose an architectural extension based on a Feature-Residual Discriminator (FR-Disc), adapting previous work on skeletal data to the more complex video domain. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that while common open-set techniques provide only marginal gains, our FR-Disc significantly enhances unknown rejection capabilities without compromising closed-set accuracy, setting a new state-of-the-art for FSOS-AR. The project website, code, and benchmark are available at: https://hsp-iit.github.io/fsosar/.
tldr: The paper introduces a Feature-Residual Discriminator (FR-Disc) method for few-shot open-set action recognition in videos, addressing the limitations of closed-set assumptions in real-world scenarios. It demonstrates improved unknown action rejection performance on multiple datasets, establishing a new state-of-the-art.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于视频中少样本开放集行为识别的特征残差判别器（FR-Disc）方法，解决了现实场景中封闭集假设的局限性。它在多个数据集上展示了改进的未知行为拒绝性能，并建立了新的技术水平。
summary_zh: 少量样本动作识别(FS-AR)已展现出可喜成果，但通常受限于闭集假设，这在现实世界的开集场景中会失效。 虽然少量样本开集(FSOS)识别已在图像领域得到充分发展，但将其扩展到时空视频数据仍未得到充分探索。 为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于特征残差判别器(FR-Disc)的架构扩展，将先前在骨骼数据上的工作适配到更复杂的视频领域。 在五个数据集上的大量实验表明，虽然常用的开集技术只能提供微薄的收益，但我们的FR-Disc能够显著增强未知类别拒绝能力，同时不影响闭集精度，从而为FSOS-AR设定了新的技术水平。 项目网站、代码和基准测试可在以下网址获取：https://hsp-iit.github.io/fsosar/。

title: EgoPoseFormer v2: Accurate Egocentric Human Motion Estimation for AR/VR
summary: Egocentric human motion estimation is essential for AR/VR experiences, yet remains challenging due to limited body coverage from the egocentric viewpoint, frequent occlusions, and scarce labeled data. We present EgoPoseFormer v2, a method that addresses these challenges through two key contributions: (1) a transformer-based model for temporally consistent and spatially grounded body pose estimation, and (2) an auto-labeling system that enables the use of large unlabeled datasets for training. Our model is fully differentiable, introduces identity-conditioned queries, multi-view spatial refinement, causal temporal attention, and supports both keypoints and parametric body representations under a constant compute budget. The auto-labeling system scales learning to tens of millions of unlabeled frames via uncertainty-aware semi-supervised training. The system follows a teacher-student schema to generate pseudo-labels and guide training with uncertainty distillation, enabling the model to generalize to different environments. On the EgoBody3M benchmark, with a 0.8 ms latency on GPU, our model outperforms two state-of-the-art methods by 12.2% and 19.4% in accuracy, and reduces temporal jitter by 22.2% and 51.7%. Furthermore, our auto-labeling system further improves the wrist MPJPE by 13.1%.
tldr: EgoPoseFormer v2 improves egocentric human motion estimation for AR/VR using a transformer-based model and an auto-labeling system for large unlabeled datasets, achieving significant accuracy and jitter reduction on the EgoBody3M benchmark.
tldr_zh: EgoPoseFormer v2通过一个基于Transformer的模型和一个用于大规模无标注数据的自动标注系统，改进了AR/VR中以自我为中心的人体运动估计，并在EgoBody3M基准测试中实现了显著的精度提升和抖动减少。
summary_zh: 第一人称视角的人体运动估计对于AR/VR体验至关重要，但由于第一人称视角带来的身体覆盖范围有限、频繁遮挡以及稀缺的标注数据，该任务仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了EgoPoseFormer v2，该方法通过两个关键贡献来解决这些挑战：（1）一种基于Transformer的模型，用于时间一致且空间对齐的身体姿态估计；（2）一种自动标注系统，能够利用大规模未标注数据集进行训练。我们的模型是完全可微的，引入了身份条件查询、多视角空间细化、因果时间注意力，并在恒定的计算预算下支持关键点和参数化身体表示。该自动标注系统通过不确定性感知的半监督训练将学习扩展到数千万帧未标注数据。该系统遵循教师-学生模式生成伪标签，并通过不确定性蒸馏指导训练，从而使模型能够泛化到不同的环境中。在EgoBody3M基准测试中，我们的模型在GPU上具有0.8毫秒的延迟，并在准确率方面优于两个最先进的方法12.2%和19.4%，并将时间抖动分别降低了22.2%和51.7%。此外，我们的自动标注系统进一步将手腕MPJPE降低了13.1%。

title: Architecture and evaluation protocol for transformer-based visual object tracking in UAV applications
summary: Object tracking from Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is challenged by platform dynamics, camera motion, and limited onboard resources. Existing visual trackers either lack robustness in complex scenarios or are too computationally demanding for real-time embedded use. We propose an Modular Asynchronous Tracking Architecture (MATA) that combines a transformer-based tracker with an Extended Kalman Filter, integrating ego-motion compensation from sparse optical flow and an object trajectory model. We further introduce a hardware-independent, embedded oriented evaluation protocol and a new metric called Normalized time to Failure (NT2F) to quantify how long a tracker can sustain a tracking sequence without external help. Experiments on UAV benchmarks, including an augmented UAV123 dataset with synthetic occlusions, show consistent improvements in Success and NT2F metrics across multiple tracking processing frequency. A ROS 2 implementation on a Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin confirms that the evaluation protocol more closely matches real-time performance on embedded systems.
tldr: This paper proposes a transformer-based visual object tracking architecture for UAVs, integrating ego-motion compensation and introducing a new evaluation protocol with a focus on real-time embedded performance and robustness. Experiments on UAV benchmarks validate the method and the new metric.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于无人机的基于 Transformer 的视觉目标跟踪架构，集成了自运动补偿，并引入了一种新的评估协议，重点关注实时嵌入式性能和鲁棒性。在无人机基准上的实验验证了该方法和新指标。
summary_zh: 无人机（UAV）上的目标跟踪面临平台动态、相机运动和有限的机载资源等挑战。现有的视觉跟踪器在复杂场景中要么缺乏鲁棒性，要么计算量过大，难以用于实时嵌入式应用。我们提出了一种模块化异步跟踪架构（MATA），它结合了基于Transformer的跟踪器和扩展卡尔曼滤波器，集成了来自稀疏光流的自身运动补偿和一个目标轨迹模型。我们进一步引入了一种硬件无关的、面向嵌入式的评估协议和一个名为归一化失效时间（NT2F）的新指标，用于量化跟踪器在没有外部帮助的情况下能够维持跟踪序列的时长。在包括带有合成遮挡的增强型UAV123数据集在内的无人机基准测试上的实验表明，在多个跟踪处理频率下，成功率和NT2F指标均有持续提升。在Nvidia Jetson AGX Orin上的ROS 2实现证实了该评估协议更贴近嵌入式系统上的实时性能。

title: Adaptive Enhancement and Dual-Pooling Sequential Attention for Lightweight Underwater Object Detection with YOLOv10
summary: Underwater object detection constitutes a pivotal endeavor within the realms of marine surveillance and autonomous underwater systems; however, it presents significant challenges due to pronounced visual impairments arising from phenomena such as light absorption, scattering, and diminished contrast. In response to these formidable challenges, this manuscript introduces a streamlined yet robust framework for underwater object detection, grounded in the YOLOv10 architecture. The proposed method integrates a Multi-Stage Adaptive Enhancement module to improve image quality, a Dual-Pooling Sequential Attention (DPSA) mechanism embedded into the backbone to strengthen multi-scale feature representation, and a Focal Generalized IoU Objectness (FGIoU) loss to jointly improve localization accuracy and objectness prediction under class imbalance. Comprehensive experimental evaluations conducted on the RUOD and DUO benchmark datasets substantiate that the proposed DPSA_FGIoU_YOLOv10n attains exceptional performance, achieving mean Average Precision (mAP) scores of 88.9% and 88.0% at IoU threshold 0.5, respectively. In comparison to the baseline YOLOv10n, this represents enhancements of 6.7% for RUOD and 6.2% for DUO, all while preserving a compact model architecture comprising merely 2.8M parameters. These findings validate that the proposed framework establishes an efficacious equilibrium among accuracy, robustness, and real-time operational efficiency, making it suitable for deployment in resource-constrained underwater settings.
tldr: This paper introduces a lightweight underwater object detection framework based on YOLOv10, incorporating adaptive enhancement, dual-pooling sequential attention, and a modified loss function to improve accuracy and efficiency in challenging underwater environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 YOLOv10 的轻量级水下目标检测框架，该框架结合了自适应增强、双池化序列注意力机制和改进的损失函数，以提高在复杂水下环境中的准确性和效率。
summary_zh: 水下目标检测是海洋监视和自主水下系统领域中的一项关键任务；然而，由于光吸收、散射和对比度降低等现象造成的显著视觉损伤，它面临着巨大的挑战。为了应对这些严峻的挑战，本文提出了一种基于YOLOv10架构的精简而强大的水下目标检测框架。该方法集成了多阶段自适应增强模块以提高图像质量，嵌入到骨干网络中的双池化序列注意力（DPSA）机制以加强多尺度特征表示，以及焦点广义IoU对象损失（FGIoU）以共同提高类别不平衡情况下的定位精度和对象性预测。在RUOD和DUO基准数据集上进行的全面实验评估证实，所提出的DPSA_FGIoU_YOLOv10n实现了卓越的性能，在IoU阈值为0.5时，分别实现了88.9%和88.0%的平均精度均值（mAP）分数。与基线YOLOv10n相比，这分别代表RUOD提升了6.7%，DUO提升了6.2%，同时保持了仅包含2.8M参数的紧凑模型架构。这些发现验证了所提出的框架在精度、鲁棒性和实时运行效率之间建立了有效的平衡，使其适用于资源受限的水下环境中的部署。

title: Observationally Informed Adaptive Causal Experimental Design
summary: Randomized Controlled Trials (RCTs) represent the gold standard for causal inference yet remain a scarce resource. While large-scale observational data is often available, it is utilized only for retrospective fusion, and remains discarded in prospective trial design due to bias concerns. We argue this "tabula rasa" data acquisition strategy is fundamentally inefficient. In this work, we propose Active Residual Learning, a new paradigm that leverages the observational model as a foundational prior. This approach shifts the experimental focus from learning target causal quantities from scratch to efficiently estimating the residuals required to correct observational bias. To operationalize this, we introduce the R-Design framework. Theoretically, we establish two key advantages: (1) a structural efficiency gap, proving that estimating smooth residual contrasts admits strictly faster convergence rates than reconstructing full outcomes; and (2) information efficiency, where we quantify the redundancy in standard parameter-based acquisition (e.g., BALD), demonstrating that such baselines waste budget on task-irrelevant nuisance uncertainty. We propose R-EPIG (Residual Expected Predictive Information Gain), a unified criterion that directly targets the causal estimand, minimizing residual uncertainty for estimation or clarifying decision boundaries for policy. Experiments on synthetic and semi-synthetic benchmarks demonstrate that R-Design significantly outperforms baselines, confirming that repairing a biased model is far more efficient than learning one from scratch.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel framework, Active Residual Learning, to improve the efficiency of causal inference in RCTs by leveraging observational data to correct for bias, leading to faster convergence and better resource allocation compared to traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的框架，即主动残差学习（Active Residual Learning），通过利用观测数据来纠正偏差，从而提高RCTs中因果推断的效率，与传统方法相比，该框架可以实现更快的收敛速度和更好的资源分配。
summary_zh: 随机对照试验（RCT）是因果推断的金标准，但仍然是一种稀缺资源。虽然大规模观测数据通常是可用的，但它仅用于回顾性融合，并且由于对偏差的担忧，在未来试验设计中被丢弃。我们认为这种“白板”数据采集策略从根本上说是低效的。在这项工作中，我们提出了主动残差学习，一种利用观测模型作为基础先验的新范式。这种方法将实验重点从从头开始学习目标因果量转移到有效估计纠正观测偏差所需的残差。为了实现这一点，我们引入了R-Design框架。从理论上讲，我们建立了两个关键优势：（1）结构效率差距，证明估计平滑残差对比的收敛速度严格快于重建完整结果；（2）信息效率，我们量化了标准参数化采集（例如，BALD）中的冗余，表明这些基线将预算浪费在与任务无关的干扰不确定性上。我们提出了R-EPIG（残差期望预测信息增益），这是一个统一的标准，它直接针对因果估计量，最小化估计的残差不确定性或明确策略的决策边界。在合成和半合成基准测试上的实验表明，R-Design 明显优于基线，证实了修复有偏见的模型比从头开始学习一个模型更有效。

title: HBRB-BoW: A Retrained Bag-of-Words Vocabulary for ORB-SLAM via Hierarchical BRB-KMeans
summary: In visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), the quality of the visual vocabulary is fundamental to the system's ability to represent environments and recognize locations. While ORB-SLAM is a widely used framework, its binary vocabulary, trained through the k-majority-based bag-of-words (BoW) approach, suffers from inherent precision loss. The inability of conventional binary clustering to represent subtle feature distributions leads to the degradation of visual words, a problem that is compounded as errors accumulate and propagate through the hierarchical tree structure. To address these structural deficiencies, this paper proposes hierarchical binary-to-real-and-back (HBRB)-BoW, a refined hierarchical binary vocabulary training algorithm. By integrating a global real-valued flow within the hierarchical clustering process, our method preserves high-fidelity descriptor information until the final binarization at the leaf nodes. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach yields a more discriminative and well-structured vocabulary than traditional methods, significantly enhancing the representational integrity of the visual dictionary in complex environments. Furthermore, replacing the default ORB-SLAM vocabulary file with our HBRB-BoW file is expected to improve performance in loop closing and relocalization tasks.
tldr: This paper introduces HBRB-BoW, a novel hierarchical vocabulary training algorithm for ORB-SLAM that improves visual dictionary representation and loop closing by preserving descriptor information during binarization.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为HBRB-BoW的新型分层词汇训练算法，用于ORB-SLAM， 通过在二值化过程中保留描述符信息，改进了视觉词典的表示和闭环。
summary_zh: 在视觉同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）中，视觉词汇表的质量对于系统表示环境和识别位置的能力至关重要。虽然ORB-SLAM是一个广泛使用的框架，但其通过基于k-众数的词袋（BoW）方法训练的二元词汇表存在固有的精度损失。传统二元聚类无法表示细微的特征分布会导致视觉词退化，而这种问题会随着误差在分层树结构中累积和传播而加剧。为了解决这些结构性缺陷，本文提出了一种精细化的分层二元词汇表训练算法，即分层二元-到实数-再到二元（HBRB）-BoW。通过在分层聚类过程中集成全局实值流，我们的方法可以保持高保真的描述符信息，直到叶子节点的最终二元化。实验结果表明，该方法比传统方法产生了更具区分性和结构良好的词汇表，显著提高了视觉词典在复杂环境中的表征完整性。此外，用我们的HBRB-BoW文件替换默认的ORB-SLAM词汇表文件预计可以提高回环检测和重定位任务的性能。

title: Lambdas at the Far Edge: a Tale of Flying Lambdas and Lambdas on Wheels
summary: Aggregate Programming (AP) is a paradigm for programming the collective behaviour of sets of distributed devices, possibly situated at the network far edge, by relying on asynchronous proximity-based interactions. The eXchange Calculus (XC), a recently proposed foundational model for AP, is essentially a typed lambda calculus extended with an operator (the exchange operator) providing an implicit communication mechanism between neighbour devices. This paper provides a gentle introduction to XC and to its implementation as a C++ library, called FCPP. The FCPP library and toolchain has been mainly developed at the Department of Computer Science of the University of Turin, where Stefano Berardi spent most of his academic career conducting outstanding research about logical foundation of computer science and transmitting his passion for research to students and young researchers, often exploiting typed lambda calculi. An FCCP program is essentially a typed lambda term, and FCPP has been used to write code that has been deployed on devices at the far edge of the network, including rovers and (soon) Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs); hence the title of the paper.
tldr: This paper introduces the eXchange Calculus (XC) and its C++ implementation (FCPP) for aggregate programming at the network edge, specifically targeting distributed devices like rovers and UAVs.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 eXchange Calculus (XC) 的计算模型及其 C++ 实现 (FCPP)，用于网络边缘的聚合编程，专门针对分布式设备（如漫游车和无人机）。
summary_zh: 聚合编程(AP)是一种编程范式，旨在通过依赖于基于异步邻近度的交互来编程分布式设备集合的集体行为，这些设备可能位于网络边缘。交换演算(XC)是最近提出的AP的基础模型，本质上是一种类型化的λ演算，扩展了一个算子(交换算子)，该算子提供了相邻设备之间的隐式通信机制。本文简要介绍了XC及其作为C++库的实现，该库名为FCPP。FCPP库和工具链主要在都灵大学计算机科学系开发，Stefano Berardi 大部分学术生涯都致力于此，他对计算机科学的逻辑基础进行了杰出的研究，并将他对研究的热情传递给学生和年轻的研究人员，经常利用类型化的λ演算。一个FCPP程序本质上是一个类型化的λ项，而FCPP已被用于编写部署在网络远端边缘的设备（包括漫游车和（即将）无人机(UAV)）上的代码；因此本文以此为题。

title: Characterization and Correlation of Robotic Snake Scale Friction and Locomotion Speed
summary: Snake robots are inspired by the ability of biological snakes to move over rock, grass, leaves, soil, up trees, along pavement and more. Their ability to move in multiple distinct environments is due to their legless locomotion strategy, which combines distinct gaits with a skin that exhibits frictional anisotropy. Designing soft robotic snakes with similar capabilities requires an understanding of how this underlying frictional anisotropy should be created in engineered systems, and how variances in the frictional anisotropy ratio affect locomotion speed and direction on different surfaces. While forward and backward frictional ratios have been characterized for previous scale designs, lateral friction and the associated ratios are often overlooked. In this paper, our contributions include: (i) the development of a novel articulated pseudo-skin design that is modular, easy to construct and has removable or replaceable scales; (ii) experimental measurement of the frictional characteristics of otherwise-identical scales at varying angles of attack (15°, 25°, 35°, 45°) on different surfaces of interest (grass, bark, smooth surface, carpet);(iii) separate measurements of locomotion speed for each angle and surface. Consequently, while we observed some consistent trends between frictional coefficients and scale angle, aligning with literature and intuition, we were not able to consistently identify expected correlations between frictional ratios and locomotion speed. We conclude that either frictional ratios alone are not sufficient to predict the observed speed of a snake robot, or that specific measurement approaches are required to accurately capture these ratios.
tldr: This paper investigates the relationship between scale friction anisotropy and locomotion speed in a snake robot with a novel scale design, finding no consistent correlation between friction ratios and speed across different surfaces.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了一种新型蛇形机器人鳞片摩擦各向异性与运动速度之间的关系，发现摩擦比与不同表面上的速度之间没有一致的关联。
summary_zh: 蛇形机器人的设计灵感来源于生物蛇类在岩石、草地、落叶、土壤、树木、路面等多种表面上的移动能力。它们能在多种不同环境中移动的能力归功于其无腿运动策略，该策略将不同的步态与具有摩擦各向异性的表皮相结合。设计具有类似能力的软体蛇形机器人，需要理解如何在工程系统中创建这种底层的摩擦各向异性，以及摩擦各向异性比率的变化如何影响在不同表面上的运动速度和方向。虽然先前尺度设计的前向和后向摩擦比率已被表征，但横向摩擦和相关的比率通常被忽略。在本文中，我们的贡献包括：（i）开发了一种新型铰接式伪表皮设计，该设计模块化、易于构建，并具有可移除或可更换的鳞片；（ii）在不同的感兴趣表面（草地、树皮、光滑表面、地毯）上，实验测量了角度可变（15°、25°、35°、45°）的相同鳞片的摩擦特性；（iii）分别测量了每个角度和表面上的运动速度。因此，虽然我们观察到摩擦系数和鳞片角度之间存在一致的趋势，与文献和直觉相符，但我们无法始终如一地确定摩擦比率和运动速度之间的预期相关性。我们得出结论，要么仅凭摩擦比率不足以预测蛇形机器人的观察到的速度，要么需要特定的测量方法才能准确捕捉这些比率。

title: Soft Semi-active Back Support Device with Adaptive Force Profiles using Variable-elastic Actuation and Weight Feedback
summary: Portable active back support devices (BSDs) offer tunable assistance but are often bulky and heavy, limiting their usability. In contrast, passive BSDs are lightweight and compact but lack the ability to adapt their assistance to different back movements. We present a soft, lightweight, and compact BSD that combines a variable-stiffness passive element and an active element (an artificial muscle) in parallel. The device provides tunable assistance through discrete changes in stiffness values and active force levels. We validate the device's tuning capabilities through bench testing and on-body characterization. Further, we use the device's tuning capabilities to provide weight-adaptive object lifting and lowering assistance. We detect the weight handled by the user based on forearm force myography and upper-back inertial measurement unit data. Furthermore, electromyography analyses in five participants performing symmetric object lifting and lowering tasks showed reductions in back extensor activity. Preliminary results in one participant also indicated reduced muscle activity during asymmetric lifting.
tldr: The paper presents a soft, lightweight back support device with variable-stiffness and active elements, demonstrating weight-adaptive lifting assistance and reduced back extensor activity.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种轻量级、柔软的背部支撑设备，该设备具有可变刚度和主动元件，能够提供重量自适应的抬举辅助并减少背部伸肌的活动。
summary_zh: 便携式主动式背部支撑装置（BSDs）提供可调节的辅助，但通常体积大且笨重，限制了其可用性。相比之下，被动式BSDs轻便且紧凑，但缺乏根据不同的背部运动调整辅助的能力。我们提出了一种柔软、轻便且紧凑的BSD，它将一个可变刚度的被动元件和一个主动元件（人工肌肉）并联结合在一起。该装置通过刚度值和主动力水平的离散变化提供可调节的辅助。我们通过台架测试和本体特征分析验证了该装置的调节能力。此外，我们利用该装置的调节能力来提供重量自适应的物体提举和降低辅助。我们基于前臂力肌电图和上背部惯性测量单元数据来检测用户处理的重量。此外，在五名参与者执行对称物体提举和降低任务的肌电图分析表明，背部伸肌活动减少。一名参与者的初步结果还表明，在非对称提举过程中，肌肉活动减少。

title: TreeLoc++: Robust 6-DoF LiDAR Localization in Forests with a Compact Digital Forest Inventory
summary: Reliable localization is essential for sustainable forest management, as it allows robots or sensor systems to revisit and monitor the status of individual trees over long periods. In modern forestry, this management is structured around Digital Forest Inventories (DFIs), which encode stems using compact geometric attributes rather than raw data. Despite their central role, DFIs have been overlooked in localization research, and most methods still rely on dense gigabyte-sized point clouds that are costly to store and maintain. To improve upon this, we propose TreeLoc++, a global localization framework that operates directly on DFIs as a discriminative representation, eliminating the need to use the raw point clouds. TreeLoc++ reduces false matches in structurally ambiguous forests and improves the reliability of full 6-DoF pose estimation. It augments coarse retrieval with a pairwise distance histogram that encodes local tree-layout context, subsequently refining candidates via DBH-based filtering and yaw-consistent inlier selection to further reduce mismatches. Furthermore, a constrained optimization leveraging tree geometry jointly estimates roll, pitch, and height, enhancing pose stability and enabling accurate localization without reliance on dense 3D point cloud data. Evaluations on 27 sequences recorded in forests across three datasets and four countries show that TreeLoc++ achieves precise localization with centimeter-level accuracy. We further demonstrate robustness to long-term change by localizing data recorded in 2025 against inventories built from 2023 data, spanning a two-year interval. The system represents 15 sessions spanning 7.98 km of trajectories using only 250KB of map data and outperforms both hand-crafted and learning-based baselines that rely on point cloud maps. This demonstrates the scalability of TreeLoc++ for long-term deployment.
tldr: The paper presents TreeLoc++, a LiDAR localization framework for forests that uses compact digital forest inventories, achieving centimeter-level accuracy and robustness to long-term changes, outperforming point cloud-based methods with significantly smaller map sizes.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了TreeLoc++，一个用于森林的激光雷达定位框架，它使用紧凑的数字森林清单，实现了厘米级的精度和对长期变化的鲁棒性，并且优于基于点云的方法，地图尺寸也大大缩小。
summary_zh: 可靠的定位对于可持续森林管理至关重要，因为它允许机器人或传感器系统在长期时间内复访和监测单个树木的状态。在现代林业中，这种管理围绕数字森林清查（DFIs）构建，后者使用紧凑的几何属性而非原始数据来编码树干。尽管DFIs具有核心作用，但在定位研究中却被忽视，大多数方法仍然依赖于存储和维护成本高昂的千兆字节级密集点云。为了改进这一点，我们提出了TreeLoc++，一种直接在DFIs上作为判别性表示运行的全局定位框架，消除了使用原始点云的需求。TreeLoc++减少了结构模糊森林中的错误匹配，并提高了完整6自由度位姿估计的可靠性。它通过编码局部树木布局上下文的成对距离直方图来增强粗略检索，随后通过基于胸径（DBH）的过滤和偏航角一致的内点选择来细化候选对象，从而进一步减少不匹配。此外，利用树木几何形状的约束优化可以联合估计横滚角、俯仰角和高度，从而提高位姿稳定性，并实现无需依赖密集3D点云数据的精确本地化。在跨三个数据集和四个国家的森林中记录的27个序列上的评估表明，TreeLoc++实现了厘米级精度的精确本地化。我们进一步证明了对长期变化的鲁棒性，通过将2025年记录的数据与基于2023年数据构建的清查进行定位，跨越了两年的间隔。该系统仅使用250KB的地图数据即可表示跨越7.98公里轨迹的15个会话，并优于依赖点云地图的手工制作和基于学习的基线。这证明了TreeLoc++对于长期部署的可扩展性。

title: Real-time loosely coupled GNSS and IMU integration via Factor Graph Optimization
summary: Accurate positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) is fundamental to the operation of modern technologies and a key enabler of autonomous systems. A very important component of PNT is the Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) which ensures outdoor positioning. Modern research directions have pushed the performance of GNSS localization to new heights by fusing GNSS measurements with other sensory information, mainly measurements from Inertial Measurement Units (IMU). In this paper, we propose a loosely coupled architecture to integrate GNSS and IMU measurements using a Factor Graph Optimization (FGO) framework. Because the FGO method can be computationally challenging and often used as a post-processing method, our focus is on assessing its localization accuracy and service availability while operating in real-time in challenging environments (urban canyons). Experimental results on the UrbanNav-HK-MediumUrban-1 dataset show that the proposed approach achieves real-time operation and increased service availability compared to batch FGO methods. While this improvement comes at the cost of reduced positioning accuracy, the paper provides a detailed analysis of the trade-offs between accuracy, availability, and computational efficiency that characterize real-time FGO-based GNSS/IMU fusion.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time, loosely coupled GNSS/IMU integration method using Factor Graph Optimization, analyzing the trade-offs between accuracy, availability, and computational efficiency in challenging urban environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于因子图优化的实时、松耦合的GNSS/IMU集成方法，分析了在具有挑战性的城市环境中，精度、可用性和计算效率之间的权衡。
summary_zh: 精确的定位、导航和授时（PNT）是现代技术运行的基础，也是自主系统的关键推动力。全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）是PNT的一个非常重要的组成部分，它确保了室外定位。现代研究方向已通过融合GNSS测量值与其他传感器信息（主要是来自惯性测量单元（IMU）的测量值）将GNSS定位的性能推向了新的高度。在本文中，我们提出了一种松耦合架构，利用因子图优化（FGO）框架来集成GNSS和IMU的测量值。由于FGO方法可能在计算上具有挑战性，并且通常用作后处理方法，因此我们的重点是评估其在具有挑战性的环境（城市峡谷）中实时运行时的定位精度和服务可用性。在UrbanNav-HK-MediumUrban-1数据集上的实验结果表明，与批处理FGO方法相比，所提出的方法实现了实时运行，并提高了服务可用性。虽然这种改进是以降低定位精度为代价的，但本文详细分析了基于实时FGO的GNSS/IMU融合的精度、可用性和计算效率之间的权衡。

title: Towards Explainable Deep Learning for Ship Trajectory Prediction in Inland Waterways
summary: Accurate predictions of ship trajectories in crowded environments are essential to ensure safety in inland waterways traffic. Recent advances in deep learning promise increased accuracy even for complex scenarios. While the challenge of ship-to-ship awareness is being addressed with growing success, the explainability of these models is often overlooked, potentially obscuring an inaccurate logic and undermining the confidence in their reliability. This study examines an LSTM-based vessel trajectory prediction model by incorporating trained ship domain parameters that provide insight into the attention-based fusion of the interacting vessels' hidden states. This approach has previously been explored in the field of maritime shipping, yet the variety and complexity of encounters in inland waterways allow for a more profound analysis of the model's interpretability. The prediction performance of the proposed model variants are evaluated using standard displacement error statistics. Additionally, the plausibility of the generated ship domain values is analyzed. With an final displacement error of around 40 meters in a 5-minute prediction horizon, the model performs comparably to similar studies. Though the ship-to-ship attention architecture enhances prediction accuracy, the weights assigned to vessels in encounters using the learnt ship domain values deviate from the expectation. The observed accuracy improvements are thus not entirely driven by a causal relationship between a predicted trajectory and the trajectories of nearby ships. This finding underscores the model's explanatory capabilities through its intrinsically interpretable design. Future work will focus on utilizing the architecture for counterfactual analysis and on the incorporation of more sophisticated attention mechanisms.
tldr: This paper explores explainable LSTM-based ship trajectory prediction in inland waterways by incorporating ship domain parameters into attention mechanisms. While achieving comparable prediction accuracy, the study reveals discrepancies between attention weights and expected ship domain influences, highlighting the model's explanatory capabilities and areas for improvement.
tldr_zh: 本文通过将船舶领域参数融入注意力机制，探索了内河航道中基于LSTM的可解释的船舶轨迹预测。虽然实现了相当的预测精度，但研究揭示了注意力权重与预期船舶领域影响之间的差异，突出了模型的可解释性能力和需要改进的领域。
summary_zh: 在拥挤环境中准确预测船舶轨迹对于确保内河航运安全至关重要。 近期深度学习的进展有望提高预测精度，即使在复杂场景下也是如此。 船舶间的感知挑战正日益成功地得到解决，但这些模型的可解释性往往被忽视，这可能掩盖了不准确的逻辑并削弱了对其可靠性的信心。 本研究通过结合训练过的船舶领域参数，来检查一个基于LSTM的船舶轨迹预测模型，这些参数提供了对交互船舶隐藏状态基于注意力机制融合的深入理解。 这种方法之前已经在海运领域被探索过，但内河航道中航行相遇的多样性和复杂性使得对模型可解释性进行更深入的分析成为可能。 使用标准位移误差统计量评估了所提出的模型变体的预测性能。 此外，还分析了生成的船舶领域值的合理性。 在5分钟的预测范围内，最终位移误差约为40米，该模型性能与类似研究相当。 尽管船间注意力架构提高了预测精度，但使用学习到的船舶领域值分配给相遇船舶的权重与预期不符。 因此，观察到的精度改进并非完全由预测轨迹与附近船舶轨迹之间的因果关系驱动。 这一发现通过模型固有的可解释性设计，强调了模型的解释能力。 未来的工作将侧重于利用该架构进行反事实分析，以及整合更为复杂的注意力机制。

title: LeafInst - Unified Instance Segmentation Network for Fine-Grained Forestry Leaf Phenotype Analysis: A New UAV based Benchmark
summary: Intelligent forest tree breeding has advanced plant phenotyping, yet existing research largely focuses on large-leaf agricultural crops, with limited attention to fine-grained leaf analysis of sapling trees in open-field environments. Natural scenes introduce challenges including scale variation, illumination changes, and irregular leaf morphology. To address these issues, we collected UAV RGB imagery of field-grown saplings and constructed the Poplar-leaf dataset, containing 1,202 branches and 19,876 pixel-level annotated leaf instances. To our knowledge, this is the first instance segmentation dataset specifically designed for forestry leaves in open-field conditions. We propose LeafInst, a novel segmentation framework tailored for irregular and multi-scale leaf structures. The model integrates an Asymptotic Feature Pyramid Network (AFPN) for multi-scale perception, a Dynamic Asymmetric Spatial Perception (DASP) module for irregular shape modeling, and a dual-residual Dynamic Anomalous Regression Head (DARH) with Top-down Concatenation decoder Feature Fusion (TCFU) to improve detection and segmentation performance. On Poplar-leaf, LeafInst achieves 68.4 mAP, outperforming YOLOv11 by 7.1 percent and MaskDINO by 6.5 percent. On the public PhenoBench benchmark, it reaches 52.7 box mAP, exceeding MaskDINO by 3.4 percent. Additional experiments demonstrate strong generalization and practical utility for large-scale leaf phenotyping.
tldr: The paper introduces LeafInst, a novel instance segmentation framework and associated Poplar-leaf dataset for fine-grained forestry leaf phenotyping using UAV imagery, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LeafInst，一种新颖的实例分割框架以及相关的Poplar-leaf数据集，用于使用无人机图像进行细粒度的林业叶片表型分析，并实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 智能林木育种促进了植物表型分析的发展，然而，现有研究主要集中于大叶农作物，对露天环境中幼树的精细叶片分析关注较少。自然场景带来了尺度变化、光照变化和不规则叶片形态等挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们采集了田间种植幼树的无人机RGB图像，并构建了杨树叶片数据集，其中包含1202个枝条和19876个像素级标注的叶片实例。据我们所知，这是第一个专门为露天条件下林业叶片设计的实例分割数据集。我们提出了LeafInst，一种为不规则和多尺度叶片结构量身定制的新型分割框架。该模型集成了用于多尺度感知的渐近特征金字塔网络(AFPN)、用于不规则形状建模的动态非对称空间感知(DASP)模块，以及具有自顶向下级联解码器特征融合(TCFU)的双残差动态异常回归头(DARH)，以提高检测和分割性能。在杨树叶片数据集上，LeafInst达到了68.4 mAP，超越YOLOv11 7.1个百分点，超越MaskDINO 6.5个百分点。在公共PhenoBench基准测试中，它达到了52.7 box mAP，超过MaskDINO 3.4个百分点。其他实验证明了其强大的泛化能力和大规模叶片表型分析的实用性。

title: Tracking Feral Horses in Aerial Video Using Oriented Bounding Boxes
summary: The social structures of group-living animals such as feral horses are diverse and remain insufficiently understood, even within a single species. To investigate group dynamics, aerial videos are often utilized to track individuals and analyze their movement trajectories, which are essential for evaluating inter-individual interactions and comparing social behaviors. Accurate individual tracking is therefore crucial. In multi-animal tracking, axis-aligned bounding boxes (bboxes) are widely used; however, for aerial top-view footage of entire groups, their performance degrades due to complex backgrounds, small target sizes, high animal density, and varying body orientations. To address this issue, we employ oriented bounding boxes (OBBs), which include rotation angles and reduce unnecessary background. Nevertheless, current OBB detectors such as YOLO-OBB restrict angles within a 180$^{\circ}$ range, making it impossible to distinguish head from tail and often causing sudden 180$^{\circ}$ flips across frames, which severely disrupts continuous tracking. To overcome this limitation, we propose a head-orientation estimation method that crops OBB-centered patches, applies three detectors (head, tail, and head-tail), and determines the final label through IoU-based majority voting. Experiments using 299 test images show that our method achieves 99.3% accuracy, outperforming individual models, demonstrating its effectiveness for robust OBB-based tracking.
tldr: The paper presents a method for tracking feral horses in aerial videos using oriented bounding boxes (OBBs) and a novel head-orientation estimation technique to improve tracking accuracy by preventing identity flips.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种使用定向边界框（OBB）在空中视频中跟踪野生马匹的方法，以及一种新的头部方向估计技术，通过防止身份翻转来提高跟踪精度。
summary_zh: 群居动物（如野马）的社会结构具有多样性，即使在同一物种内也未被充分理解。为了研究群体动态，常利用航拍视频来追踪个体并分析其运动轨迹，这对于评估个体间交互作用和比较社会行为至关重要。因此，准确的个体追踪至关重要。在多动物追踪中，轴对齐边界框（bboxes）被广泛使用；然而，对于整个群体的航拍俯视镜头，由于复杂的背景、小目标尺寸、高动物密度和变化的身体朝向，其性能会下降。为了解决这个问题，我们采用了包含旋转角度并能够减少不必要背景的旋转边界框（OBBs）。然而，当前的OBB检测器（如YOLO-OBB）将角度限制在180°范围内，这使得区分头部和尾部变得不可能，并且经常导致跨帧的突然180°翻转，严重扰乱了连续追踪。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种头部朝向估计方法，该方法裁剪以OBB为中心的图像块，应用三个检测器（头部、尾部和头部-尾部），并通过基于IoU的多数投票确定最终标签。使用299张测试图像的实验表明，我们的方法达到了99.3%的准确率，优于单个模型，证明了其对于鲁棒的基于OBB的追踪的有效性。

title: Confidence-aware Monocular Depth Estimation for Minimally Invasive Surgery
summary: Purpose: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) is vital for scene understanding in minimally invasive surgery (MIS). However, endoscopic video sequences are often contaminated by smoke, specular reflections, blur, and occlusions, limiting the accuracy of MDE models. In addition, current MDE models do not output depth confidence, which could be a valuable tool for improving their clinical reliability. Methods: We propose a novel confidence-aware MDE framework featuring three significant contributions: (i) Calibrated confidence targets: an ensemble of fine-tuned stereo matching models is used to capture disparity variance into pixel-wise confidence probabilities; (ii) Confidence-aware loss: Baseline MDE models are optimized with confidence-aware loss functions, utilizing pixel-wise confidence probabilities such that reliable pixels dominate training; and (iii) Inference-time confidence: a confidence estimation head is proposed with two convolution layers to predict per-pixel confidence at inference, enabling assessment of depth reliability. Results: Comprehensive experimental validation across internal and public datasets demonstrates that our framework improves depth estimation accuracy and can robustly quantify the prediction's confidence. On the internal clinical endoscopic dataset (StereoKP), we improve dense depth estimation accuracy by ~8% as compared to the baseline model. Conclusion: Our confidence-aware framework enables improved accuracy of MDE models in MIS, addressing challenges posed by noise and artifacts in pre-clinical and clinical data, and allows MDE models to provide confidence maps that may be used to improve their reliability for clinical applications.
tldr: The paper presents a confidence-aware monocular depth estimation framework for minimally invasive surgery, improving accuracy and providing confidence estimates for clinical reliability.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个置信度感知的单目深度估计框架，用于微创手术，提高了准确性，并为临床可靠性提供了置信度估计。
summary_zh: 目的：单目深度估计(MDE)对于微创手术(MIS)中的场景理解至关重要。然而，内窥镜视频序列经常受到烟雾、镜面反射、模糊和遮挡的干扰，限制了MDE模型的准确性。此外，当前的MDE模型不输出深度置信度，而深度置信度可能成为提高其临床可靠性的宝贵工具。方法：我们提出了一种新型的置信度感知MDE框架，其主要贡献在于三点：(i) 校准的置信度目标：采用微调的立体匹配模型集合，将视差方差捕获为像素级的置信度概率；(ii) 置信度感知损失：基准MDE模型通过置信度感知损失函数进行优化，利用像素级的置信度概率，使可靠像素在训练中占据主导地位；(iii) 推理时置信度：提出了一个置信度估计头，包含两个卷积层，用于预测推理时每个像素的置信度，从而评估深度可靠性。结果：在内部和公共数据集上进行的全面实验验证表明，我们的框架提高了深度估计的准确性，并且可以稳健地量化预测的置信度。在内部临床内窥镜数据集(StereoKP)上，与基准模型相比，我们提高了约8%的密集深度估计精度。结论：我们的置信度感知框架提高了MDE模型在MIS中的准确性，解决了临床前和临床数据中噪声和伪影带来的挑战，并使MDE模型能够提供置信度图，从而提高其在临床应用中的可靠性。

title: Fixed-Budget Constrained Best Arm Identification in Grouped Bandits
summary: We study fixed budget constrained best-arm identification in grouped bandits, where each arm consists of multiple independent attributes with stochastic rewards. An arm is considered feasible only if all its attributes' means are above a given threshold. The aim is to find the feasible arm with the largest overall mean. We first derive a lower bound on the error probability for any algorithm on this setting. We then propose Feasibility Constrained Successive Rejects (FCSR), a novel algorithm that identifies the best arm while ensuring feasibility. We show it attains optimal dependence on problem parameters up to constant factors in the exponent. Empirically, FCSR outperforms natural baselines while preserving feasibility guarantees.
tldr: This paper introduces a new algorithm, FCSR, for best-arm identification in grouped bandits with feasibility constraints, proving its optimality and demonstrating its effectiveness empirically.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的算法FCSR，用于在具有可行性约束的分组bandit中进行最佳臂识别，证明了其最优性并通过实验证明了其有效性。
summary_zh: 我们研究了分组老虎机中的固定预算约束最优臂识别问题，其中每个臂由多个具有随机回报的独立属性组成。只有在其所有属性的均值都高于给定阈值时，该臂才被认为是可行的。目标是找到具有最大总体均值的可行臂。我们首先推导了适用于此设置下任何算法的错误概率下界。然后，我们提出了一种新算法，即可行性约束连续拒绝算法（FCSR），该算法在确保可行性的前提下识别最佳臂。我们证明了它在指数上达到了对问题参数的最佳依赖性，直至常数因子。在实验上，FCSR优于自然基线，同时保留了可行性保证。

title: Real-time tightly coupled GNSS and IMU integration via Factor Graph Optimization
summary: Reliable positioning in dense urban environments remains challenging due to frequent GNSS signal blockage, multipath, and rapidly varying satellite geometry. While factor graph optimization (FGO)-based GNSS-IMU fusion has demonstrated strong robustness and accuracy, most formulations remain offline. In this work, we present a real-time tightly coupled GNSS-IMU FGO method that enables causal state estimation via incremental optimization with fixed-lag marginalization, and we evaluate its performance in a highly urbanized GNSS-degraded environment using the UrbanNav dataset.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time tightly coupled GNSS-IMU integration method using factor graph optimization for robust positioning in urban environments, addressing GNSS signal degradation issues.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于因子图优化的实时紧耦合GNSS-IMU集成方法，用于在城市环境中实现鲁棒定位，解决了GNSS信号退化问题。
summary_zh: 在密集的城市环境中，由于频繁的GNSS信号遮挡、多径效应和快速变化的卫星几何结构，实现可靠的定位仍然具有挑战性。尽管基于因子图优化(FGO)的GNSS-IMU融合已经展现出强大的鲁棒性和精度，但大多数公式仍然是离线的。 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种实时的紧耦合GNSS-IMU FGO方法，该方法通过具有固定延迟边缘化的增量优化来实现因果状态估计。我们使用UrbanNav数据集，在一个高度城市化的GNSS退化环境中评估了其性能。

title: Activity Recognition from Smart Insole Sensor Data Using a Circular Dilated CNN
summary: Smart insoles equipped with pressure sensors, accelerometers, and gyroscopes offer a non-intrusive means of monitoring human gait and posture. We present an activity classification system based on a circular dilated convolutional neural network (CDCNN) that processes multi-modal time-series data from such insoles. The model operates on 160-frame windows with 24 channels (18 pressure, 3 accelerometer, 3 gyroscope axes), achieving 86.42% test accuracy in a subject-independent evaluation on a four-class task (Standing, Walking, Sitting, Tandem), compared with 87.83% for an extreme gradient-boosted tree (XGBoost) model trained on flattened data. Permutation feature importance reveals that inertial sensors (accelerometer and gyroscope) contribute substantially to discrimination. The approach is suitable for embedded deployment and real-time inference.
tldr: This paper introduces a circular dilated CNN (CDCNN) for activity recognition from smart insole sensor data, achieving comparable accuracy to XGBoost in a subject-independent evaluation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于环形扩张卷积神经网络（CDCNN）的智能鞋垫传感器数据活动识别方法，在主体独立的评估中获得了与XGBoost相当的准确性。
summary_zh: 配备压力传感器、加速度计和陀螺仪的智能鞋垫提供了一种非侵入式监测人体步态和姿势的手段。我们提出了一种基于圆形膨胀卷积神经网络 (CDCNN) 的活动分类系统，该系统处理来自此类鞋垫的多模态时间序列数据。该模型在具有 24 个通道（18 个压力通道、3 个加速度计轴和 3 个陀螺仪轴）的 160 帧窗口上运行，在四类任务（站立、行走、坐立、并步）的受试者独立评估中，实现了 86.42% 的测试准确率，而基于扁平化数据训练的极端梯度提升树 (XGBoost) 模型的准确率为 87.83%。排列特征重要性表明，惯性传感器（加速度计和陀螺仪）对区分度有显著贡献。该方法适用于嵌入式部署和实时推理。

title: Detection and Identification of Penguins Using Appearance and Motion Features
summary: In animal facilities, continuous surveillance of penguins is essential yet technically challenging due to their homogeneous visual characteristics, rapid and frequent posture changes, and substantial environmental noise such as water reflections. In this study, we propose a framework that enhances both detection and identification performance by integrating appearance and motion features. For detection, we adapted YOLO11 to process consecutive frames to overcome the lack of temporal consistency in single-frame detectors. This approach leverages motion cues to detect targets even when distinct visual features are obscured. Our evaluation shows that fine-tuning the model with two-frame inputs improves mAP@0.5 from 0.922 to 0.933, outperforming the baseline, and successfully recovers individuals that are indistinguishable in static images. For identification, we introduce a tracklet-based contrastive learning approach applied after tracking. Through qualitative visualization, we demonstrate that the method produces coherent feature embeddings, bringing samples from the same individual closer in the feature space, suggesting the potential for mitigating ID switching.
tldr: This paper presents a framework for penguin detection and identification using appearance and motion features, improving performance via a modified YOLO and tracklet-based contrastive learning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个利用外观和运动特征进行企鹅检测和识别的框架，通过改进的YOLO和基于轨迹的对比学习来提高性能。
summary_zh: 在动物设施中，对企鹅进行持续监测至关重要，但由于其视觉特征同质化、姿势变化迅速且频繁以及大量环境噪声（如水面反射），在技术上极具挑战性。本研究提出了一种通过整合外观和运动特征来提高检测和识别性能的框架。在检测方面，我们改进了YOLO11以处理连续帧，从而克服单帧检测器在时间一致性上的不足。该方法利用运动线索来检测目标，即使当独特的视觉特征被遮挡时也能发挥作用。评估结果表明，使用双帧输入微调模型可将mAP@0.5从0.922提高到0.933，优于基线模型，并成功恢复了在静态图像中无法区分的个体。在识别方面，我们引入了一种在跟踪后应用的基于轨迹片段的对比学习方法。通过定性可视化，我们证明该方法生成了连贯的特征嵌入，将来自同一主体的样本在特征空间中拉得更近，表明其具有减轻ID切换的潜力。
